# Bentheimer Sandstone

**Summary**: A high permeability sandstone used for comparison in the study.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1991-ali|Ali, 1991]] used bentheimer-sandstone to evaluate the impact of sample size on capillary pressure curves.

## Depositional Environment



## Reservoir Properties

- [[1991-ali|Ali, 1991]] Porosity 20.8-23.4%, Permeability 905-1646 md

## Diagenetic History



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The displacement pressure was found to be independent of sample size for Bentheimer samples. ([[1991-ali|Ali, 1991, p. 77]])
